acceptanceCriteria: rigor governance exits 0 only when branch pull-request rules, the required rigor status check, approval count >= 1, stale-review dismissal, code-owner review, last-push approval, force-push and deletion blocking, CODEOWNERS coverage of policy-protected paths, and deployment environment protection all verify as satisfied
rigor governance exits 2 when any requirement fails or cannot be verified with the available read scope, and exit 3 is used for invalid inputs
the command performs only GET requests to api.github.com, sends credentials only there, and never performs a configuration write
CODEOWNERS coverage uses last-match-wins semantics where an entry without owners removes coverage
unit tests cover pass, fail, and unverifiable outcomes plus CODEOWNERS boundary cases including anchoring, escaped spaces, non-ASCII paths, negation lines, and empty-owner entries
npm run test:all passes including build, plugin validation, and link checks
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
